isolation_compliance: Rule D: no R1-R7/R8/R9 audit artifacts consulted; only canonical raw/ocr/cleaned/classified/structured/translated/output read.
convergence_signal: NOT_CONVERGED — page 445 carries 3 release-impacting defect categories that escaped R9-C remediation. Two of these (answer-key inconsistency, garbled stem) propagated from the cleaning stage into the final output/ artifact and corrupt the published JSON. R10-3 cannot certify convergence; recommend R11 patch round.

high_severity_findings_summary.summary: Cleaned stage reordered choices ア/ウ but answer_index=0 was preserved. Output now says correct answer = ア = 'Sunday full backup only' which is mathematically wrong for restoring Tuesday end-of-day under incremental backup semantics. Printed answer key (cleaned line 64) says ア, which under raw OCR ordering = 'Sunday full + Mon+Tue incremental' = the actually-correct content. Fix: either restore raw-OCR choice order, or set answer_index=2.

Cleaned stage corrupted the JP stem of question 12-6 ('セルD4にE2による式計算式を求め、セルD4にE2の人金する式計算式' is nonsensical). ZH and EN faithfully translated the garbage. Published output is unreadable. Fix: reset to raw-OCR JP stem and re-translate.
Raw OCR exam-year metadata 「平成28年度」 mutated to 「平成29年春」 in output. Affects citeability/factual correctness.

notes: Page 367 PASS by R6 spec: exam classification with 0 entities; no defect — exam answer-explanation dropout is by design.
Page 473 and 475 are minimal-entity pages (chapter intro / figure-only); their compression is consistent with R6 design.

All choice-marker normalization in output/pages/page_445.json is correct (A/B/C/D); the leak ア/イ/ウ/エ remains only in the intermediate translated/page_445.json stage. If translated/ is part of the release bundle, normalize; otherwise non-blocking.
Several term translations (稼働率 → 可用率, ドライブバイダウンロード → 路过式下载攻击, パスワードリスト攻撃 → 密码列表攻击) are non-canonical but understandable; polish-tier only.
recommendation: R11 must patch page 445: (1) reconcile question 12-4 answer_index vs choice order, (2) restore raw-OCR stem for question 12-6, (3) fix exam-year metadata on all three questions. After patch, re-spot-check page 445 only. Other 7 pages in this lane converge.
